Subject: ports/141686: net/ntp 4.2.4p7@1.1607-o stops interferes with gpsd 
2.39

Do you use gpsd from ports? I'm not convinced this is an ntpd issue. It 
appears it may be a gpsd issue. Have you tried a newer version of gpsd?
